title: Richard Garriott seeks to recover the rights of Ultima from EA through a legal loophole
summary: The legendary creator plans to use a copyright clause to reclaim the franchise in 2027.

title: ArenaNet announces Mistbound, a Guild Wars collectible card game
summary: Following the announcement of Guild Wars 3, the company reveals a new card game set in the same universe.

title: CD Projekt Red admits that some players' trust was lost forever after Cyberpunk 2077
summary: The company's CEO states that he hopes to regain the faith of followers with the release of The Witcher 4.

title: New sales projections and prices for GTA 6 generate debate
summary: An investment bank turned to Reddit to estimate the game's sales, while players react to possible prices.

title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in a plane accident
summary: The executive, brother of the founders, died in the crash of a small plane.

title: Bleach finally has a definitive end date after 22 years of waiting
summary: The anime series will conclude its final arc with a confirmed date.

title: Microsoft facilitates game launches on the Xbox ecosystem for PC
summary: The company takes a key step to match the publishing experience with that of Steam.

title: Obsidian faces a class-action lawsuit for wage law violations
summary: The RPG studio is accused of not complying with state regulations on wages.

title: Naruto will receive its first official collectible card game in over a decade
summary: The franchise expands into the TCG genre with a new license.

title: Toy Story 5's release outgrossed The Super Mario Galaxy Movie at the box office
summary: The fifth installment of the animated saga achieved the best opening weekend for a video game movie.

title: The British government paid officials to play GTA Online as social research
summary: The project aimed to study player behavior in virtual environments.

title: The wait for 'The Winds of Winter' reaches a surprising milestone
summary: Fans of the saga have been waiting over a decade for the sixth installment of A Song of Ice and Fire.

title: The actors of 'House of the Dragon' reveal the challenges of the Battle of the Gullet
summary: The third season will feature one of the most complex combat sequences in the series.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved corrects the local co-op requirements on PS5
summary: The game changes its controversial decision regarding the co-op mode for Sony's console.

title: Higurashi When They Cry will have a new anime series
summary: The well-known Japanese visual novel receives a new TV adaptation.

title: Bandai Namco will bring 'My Hero Academia: All's Justice' to Switch 2
summary: The fighting game based on the manga will arrive on Nintendo's new console.

title: Diablo 4: Lord of Hatred receives age rating for Switch 2 in Taiwan
summary: The action RPG expansion could be close to being announced for Nintendo's console.

title: The team behind Luna Abyss is laid off less than a month after its release
summary: The studio behind the bullet hell shooter suffers massive layoffs after releasing the game.

title: Epic Games plans to improve launcher speed and add store reviews
summary: The company seeks to optimize the user experience on its PC gaming platform.

title: Don't Starve Together reaches a new concurrent player record ten years later
summary: The indie survival game continues to attract a large base of active players.
